description: Perform a multiple linear regression analysis in JASP using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv to predict 'Exam' scores based on 'Anxiety' and 'Revise'. The analysis must include collinearity diagnostics (VIF) and part and partial correlations. Save the JASP project as /home/ga/Documents/JASP/RegressionDiagnostics.jasp. Additionally, create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/diagnostics_report.txt documenting the Anxiety VIF, Anxiety Part Correlation, and an interpretation of whether multicollinearity is a concern.
